text: All Added new fields: 1) CLM_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD to all base claims, and LINE_RSDL_PYMT_IND_CD to Carrier and DME lines; 2) CLM_RP_IND_CD to IP base claim, REV_CNTR_RP_IND_CD to SNF, HH, Hospice and OP revenue lines, and LINE_RP_IND_CD to Carrier and DME lines; 3) PRVDR_VLDTN_TYPE_CD to all base claims except for DME, and LINE_PRVDR_VLDTN_TYPE_CD to Carrier and DME line; 4) RR_BRD_EXCLSN_IND_SW to IP,SNF, HH, Hospice and OP base claims, and LINE_RR_BRD_EXCLSN_IND_SW to DME line; 5)
